# PURISH | Your Beauty Dealer

Manage consent preferences

Reject all Accept all

We use cookies to optimize website functionality, analyze the performance, and provide personalized experience to you. Some cookies are essential to make the website operate and function correctly. Those cookies cannot be disabled. In this window you can manage your preference of cookies.

Strictly necessary cookies

Always allowed

These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around the website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

Cookies details

*   Name secure_customer_sig Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to identify a user after they sign into a shop as a customer so they do not need to log in again.
*   Name cart_currency Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Used after a checkout is completed to initialize a new empty cart with the same currency as the one just used.
*   Name _cmp_a Provider Shopify Domain.purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 24 hours Purpose Used for managing customer privacy settings.
*   Name keep_alive Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used when international domain redirection is enabled to determine if a request is the first one of a session.
*   Name cart_ts Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Used in connection with checkout.
*   Name cart_ver Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Set every time a cart is updated and used to track cart version mismatches.
*   Name localization Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to localize the cart to the correct country.
*   Name cart_sig Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose A hash of the contents of a cart. This is used to verify the integrity of the cart and to ensure performance of some cart operations.
*   Name cart Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Contains information related to the user's cart.
*   Name _secure_session_id Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 24 hours Purpose Used in connection with navigation through a storefront.
*   Name _tracking_consent Provider Shopify Domain.purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to store a user's preferences if a merchant has set up privacy rules in the visitor's region.
*   Name _pandectes_gdpr Provider Pandectes Domain.purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used for the functionality of the cookies consent banner.
*   Name discount_code Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Stores a discount code (received from an online store visit with a URL parameter) in order to the next checkout.

Functional cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable the site to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Cookies details

*   Name _hjSession_1188188 Provider Hotjar Domain.purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used by Hotjar to provide functions across pages.
*   Name wpm-domain-test Provider Shopify Domain com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to test Shopify's Web Pixel Manager with the domain to make sure everything is working correctly. 
*   Name wpm-domain-test Provider Shopify Domain purish.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to test Shopify's Web Pixel Manager with the domain to make sure everything is working correctly. 

Performance cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable us to monitor and improve the performance of our website. For example, they allow us to count visits, identify traffic sources and see which parts of the site are most popular.
